task_description: Conduct broad research on WiFi penetration testing, gathering general information, tools, and techniques used in the field.
Identify and list commonly used tools in WiFi penetration testing, focusing on tools like Aircrack-ng, Kismet, and others.
Investigate techniques used in WiFi penetration testing, looking into methods like packet sniffing, man-in-the-middle, and others.
Find case studies or real-world applications of WiFi penetration testing.
